description: Design a horizontal-axis wind turbine (HAWT) rotor and determine its optimal operational RPM for a wind speed of 12 m/s. The design must utilize a NACA 4412 airfoil (analyzed at Re=1,000,000 with 360-degree polar extrapolation) for a 3-bladed rotor with a 10m radius. The rotor geometry should follow a linear distribution from Root (Chord=1.5m, Twist=10°) to Tip (Chord=0.5m, Twist=0°). Identify the optimal Tip Speed Ratio (TSR) and maximum Power Coefficient (Cp) through BEM simulation to calculate the optimal RPM at 12 m/s. Save the project to /home/ga/Documents/projects/rpm_study.wpa and record the Optimal TSR, Max Cp, and Optimal RPM in a report at /home/ga/Documents/projects/optimal_rpm_report.txt.
